characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, fair complexion. Long straight blonde hair with dark roots. Dark lipstick and eyeliner.
characters.demeanor: Casual, slightly hesitant but engaged, focused on her coloring.

characters.appearance: Voice only, represented by a 3D animated female avatar with red hair visible on a tablet screen.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Can you speak English?
Character A says: Uhh... thoda thoda. [Uhh... a little bit.]
Character B says: Okay, English mein kya bol lete ho? [Okay, what can you say in English?]
Character A says: Hello... How are you? [Hello... How are you?]
Character B says: Nice! Aur kya? [Nice! What else?]
Character A says: Thank you. [Thank you.]
Character B says: Good. Aur jab koi mistake ho jaye toh kya bolte ho? [Good. And what do you say when you make a mistake?]
Character A says: I... sorry? [I... sorry?]
Character B says: Almost. Bolo: "I apologize." [Almost. Say: "I apologize."]
Character A says: I apologize. [I apologize.]
Character B says: Tumhara level beginner hai, par that's totally fine. [Your level is beginner, but that's totally fine.]
Character A says: Mujhe English bolne mein darr lagta hai... bas samajh aati hai. [I feel scared speaking English... I only understand it.]
Character B says: Start karne ke liye itna kaafi hai! Tum mere jaise AI tutors ke saath practice kar sakti ho. [That's enough to start! You can practice with AI tutors like me.]
Character A says: Tumhare jaise? [Like you?]
Character B says: Haan! Supernova app par AI tutors tumhe naturally English bolna sikhate hain, aur mistakes bhi correct karte hain. [Yes! On the Supernova app, AI tutors teach you to speak English naturally, and correct your mistakes too.]
Character A says: Par... AI ke saath? [But... with an AI?]
Character B says: Try karke dekho, bina kisi judgement ke confidence badhega. [Give it a try, your confidence will grow without any judgement.]
Character A says: Okay... mujhe English sikhao. [Okay... teach me English.]
Character B says: Zaroor! Par apne naye teacher ko orders dena band karo. [Sure! But stop giving orders to your new teacher.]
Character A says: I apologize... [I apologize...]
Character B says: Jao, abhi Supernova download karo. [Go, download Supernova right now.]
Character A says: Okay, okay, jaa rahi hoon! [Okay, okay, I'm going!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable language assessment moment.
- Highlights the core problem: understanding English but fearing speaking it.
- Introduces Supernova's AI tutor as a safe, non-judgemental space to practice and build confidence.
- Ends with a lighthearted, encouraging call to action.

- Provides a clear, static call to action.
- Displays the brand logo and app store availability for easy discovery.
